tools.name: SGM Content Generator
tools.primaryUseCase: Generates blog posts, social copy, and ad text tailored to client brand voice and tone guidelines

tools.name: SEO Brief Builder
tools.primaryUseCase: Creates comprehensive SEO content briefs with keyword targets, structure recommendations, and competitor analysis

tools.name: Ad Copy Variant Generator
tools.primaryUseCase: Produces multiple RSA headline and description variants from a single brief, optimised for character limits

tools.name: Campaign Image Creator
tools.primaryUseCase: Generates campaign imagery and social media visuals based on brand guidelines and campaign themes

tools.name: Analytics Report Summariser
tools.primaryUseCase: Takes raw GA4 and ad platform data exports and generates plain-English performance summaries for client reports

tools.name: Client Onboarding Assistant
tools.primaryUseCase: Guides account managers through the client onboarding checklist and auto-drafts welcome emails and kickoff agendas

tools.name: Keyword Clustering Engine
tools.primaryUseCase: Groups large keyword lists into topical clusters and maps them to content hub structures
